title: ITALY enforcement action against Postepay S.p.a. (5,877,000)
summary: Non-compliance with general data processing principles The Italian DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 5,877,000 on Postepay S.p.a. The controller operated a banking application and used the ThreatMetrix fraud prevention tool. Use of the tool was mandatory for customers using the controller's banking app. The tool had been configured in such a...
